description: A T-beam extruded along the X-axis, centered at the origin, with a 3mm thick vertical web and a 30mm wide, 3mm thick horizontal flange on top.
notes: The T-beam should be centered at the origin. This means X extends from -40 to 40, Y extends from -15 to 15 (for the flange), and Z extends from 0 to 40. Ensure the web is centered on Y=0 (extending from Y=-1.5 to 1.5) and spans Z=0 to Z=37. The flange should span Z=37 to Z=40 and Y=-15 to 15.
